text: 我二十三年的经验以来
我只要做噩梦，现实就会过得好
我要是做的美梦，现实就会倒大霉
So dreaming of me counts as a good dream
rawContent: So dreaming of me counts as a good dream || 所以梦到我算美梦
Noted || 记下了

text: Then have a nightmare. Sleep well after
translation: 那就做噩梦 醒了日子顺
rawContent: Then have a nightmare. Sleep well after || 那就做噩梦 醒了日子顺

translation: 什么都不想的睡眠被低估了

Gotr

text: 好想看看宝宝赖床的样子

好想钻到宝宝怀里闻闻

text: Raining that hard and you still wanna go out for noodles
